薩爾達殿下為什麼會下這種指示呢……

member of the team to reach this
survey location.
By then, everyone was dressed like this
by order of Princess Zelda. Why would
she give such a strange command?

age in <Color=red>Lurelin Village<Color=white>. So, yeah, gotta say

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>就是我出生长大的村子哩，<unk[5:0]>

那是个沿海的村庄，
大家都靠打鱼生活。
不过我因为不会游泳……<unk[5:0]>所以就放弃成为渔夫，
申请加入左纳乌调查队哩。
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>但是，最近我听说村子被<Color=red>海盗<Color=white>袭击了，
在烦恼要不要回去哩……

<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>那裡是我的故鄉哩。<unk[5:0]>

那是一座臨海村落，
大家都以捕魚為生。
不過因為我不會游泳……<unk[5:0]>所以我就放棄當漁夫，
參加了左納烏調查隊哩。
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>但是聽說村子最近遭受<Color=red>海盜<Color=white>襲擊，
我在煩惱要不要回去哩……

<Ruby={4:6}うみぞ>海沿いの<Ruby={2:4}むら>村で
みんな<Ruby={2:6}りょう>漁をして <Ruby={2:2}く>暮らしてるんだけど
<Ruby={2:4}おれ>俺は<Ruby={2:4}およ>泳げないから…<unk[5:0]> <Ruby={4:8}りょうし>漁師になるのを<Ruby={2:6}あきら>諦めて
ゾナウ<Ruby={6:12}ちょうさたい>調査隊に <Ruby={4:6}しがん>志願したんさね

<Ruby={2:4}もど>戻るかどうか<Ruby={2:4}なや>悩んでるわいさ…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>That's where I come from. Far, far, far
to the <Color=red>southeast<Color=white> from here.

It's on the sea. Everyone there makes a
living by fishing.

I can't swim. Just don't have the knack
for it. So I didn't bother with all that
fisherman stuff.
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>Being on the Zonai Survey Team is the
life for me. So I volunteered for action,
and action's what I got!
But I have to say, I heard that <Color=red>pirates<Color=white>
have taken over my village. That...<unk[5:1]>worries
me. I'm not sure if I can ever go back.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:263]>所以，聊聊<Color=red>小狗的话题<Color=white>

<unk[3:0:263]>所以說，聊聊<Color=red>狗狗的話題<Color=white>，

<unk[3:0:263]>Oh, yes... There's almost nothing better

<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 48]>因为驿站的姑娘喜欢狗，

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 48]>The girl at the stable says she likes dogs,
so I started learning about them!

Turns out that when dogs <Color=red>get close<Color=white> with a
person, they'll <Color=red>find treasure for them<Color=white>!

<unk[3:0:257]>What's that?<unk[5:0]> How do you get close with a
dog? <unk[5:1]>Well...<unk[5:1]>love and loyalty, of course!

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>You're heading out now?<unk[5:0]> That makes
sense. Nice to get an early start.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>现在就要出发哩？<unk[5:0]>
就是要趁日头高照踏上旅途才安心哩～
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>現在就要出發哩？<unk[5:0]>
還是趁豔陽高照時踏上旅途最好哩～
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]><Ruby={2:4}いま>今から<Ruby={4:10}しゅっぱつ>出発するわいさ？<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={4:6}たびだ>旅立ちは やっぱり<Ruby={2:2}ひ>日が<Ruby={2:4}たか>高い<Ruby={2:4}とき>時が<Ruby={4:8}あんしん>安心さね
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>You're heading out now?<unk[5:0]> Good thinking.
A little safer these days when the sun's
high in the sky.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>现在就要出发哩？<unk[5:0]>
这一带就数夕阳西下的时候最美哩。
你注意安全，
小心别看风景看得太入迷，脚下踩空哩～
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>現在就要出發哩？<unk[5:0]>
這附近傍晚時的景色超級漂亮哩。
要小心不要看得入迷
而走路踩空哩～
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]><Ruby={2:4}いま>今から<Ruby={4:10}しゅっぱつ>出発するわいさ？<unk[5:0]>
この<Ruby={2:4}あた>辺りの<Ruby={4:6}ゆうぐ>夕暮れ<Ruby={2:4}どき>時は <Ruby={4:8}さいこう>最高にキレイさね
<Ruby={4:6}けしき>景色に<Ruby={2:2}み>見とれて <Ruby={2:4}あし>足を<Ruby={2:2}ふ>踏み<Ruby={2:4}はず>外さないように
<Ruby={2:2}き>気を<Ruby={2:2}つ>付けるわいさ～
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>You're heading out now?<unk[5:0]> Well, it is
really beautiful around here earlier in
the evening.
Watch where you're going though. Easy
to look at the view and take a bad step!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>现在就要出发哩？<unk[5:0]>
趁着月色踏上旅途也不错哩～
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>現在就要出發哩？<unk[5:0]>
在月色下旅行也不錯哩～
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]><Ruby={2:4}いま>今から<Ruby={4:10}しゅっぱつ>出発するわいさ？<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={4:8}つきあか>月明りの<Ruby={2:4}たび>旅も <Ruby={2:4}わる>悪くないさね～
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>You're heading out now?<unk[5:0]> Well, I can't
think of many things nicer than traveling
by moonlight.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:8 69 97 115 101]>虽然我才刚加入左纳乌调查队……

但抛开遗迹，有关生物的研究
似乎也很有趣哩……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:8 69 97 115 101]>雖然我才剛加入左納烏調查隊……

不過先不談遺跡，
研究生物好像也挺有趣的哩……
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:8 69 97 115 101]>ゾナウ<Ruby={6:12}ちょうさたい>調査隊に<Ruby={2:4}はい>入ったばかりだけど…

<Ruby={4:6}いせき>遺跡じゃなくて <Ruby={2:2}い>生き<Ruby={2:4}もの>物の<Ruby={4:10}けんきゅう>研究ってのも
<Ruby={4:8}おもしろ>面白そうさね…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:12]><unk[4:0:8 69 97 115 101]>I just joined the Zonai Survey Team and
thought I'd be investigating ruins. But
researching monsters seems interesting.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 76 95 48 49]>哦哦！旅行者！<unk[5:0]>
旅行还顺利哩？
我和驿站的姑娘
聊<Color=red>小狗的话题<Color=white>还是聊得很欢哩！
<unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 48]>因为<Color=red>沃托里村<Color=white>没有和我同龄的女孩子，
所以能和她说上话我很开心哩。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 76 95 48 49]>你又來哩！旅行者！<unk[5:0]>
旅途還順利哩？
我一樣跟驛站小姐
聊<Color=red>狗狗的話題<Color=white>聊得很起勁哩！
<unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 48]>因為<Color=red>沃托里村<Color=white>裡沒有年輕女孩，
所以能和他聊上天真是讓人高興哩。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 76 95 48 49]>おお！ <Ruby={2:4}たび>旅の<Ruby={2:4}ひと>人！<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={2:4}たび>旅は<Ruby={4:12}じゅんちょう>順調さね？
<Ruby={2:4}おれ>俺は<Ruby={4:6}あいか>相変わらず <Ruby={4:8}うまやど>馬宿のお<Ruby={2:4}ねえ>姉さんと
<Color=red><Ruby={2:4}いぬ>犬の<Ruby={2:6}はなし>話<Color=white>で<Ruby={2:2}も>盛り<Ruby={2:2}あ>上がってるわいさ！
<Color=red><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 48]>ウオトリー<Ruby={2:4}むら>村<Color=white>には <Ruby={6:12}どうねんだい>同年代の<Ruby={2:6}おんな>女の<Ruby={2:2}こ>子がいないから
<Ruby={2:4}はな>話せて<Ruby={2:4}うれ>嬉しいさね
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 76 95 48 49]>Here you are again! How are your travels
treating you?

I'm still having good talks with that girl
at the stable <Color=red>about dogs<Color=white>.

<unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 48]>There aren't many girls right around my
age in <Color=red>Lurelin Village<Color=white>. So, I gotta say it's
always great to talk.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 76 95 48 49]>哎呀～
真没想到聊<Color=red>小狗的话题<Color=white>
都能聊这么欢哩。

我在<Color=red>沃托里村<Color=white>的时候
完全没聊过小狗的话题哩。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 76 95 48 49]>哎呀～沒想到
<Color=red>狗狗的話題<Color=white>，
居然可以聊得這麼開哩。

我在<Color=red>沃托里村<Color=white>的時候，
根本都沒聊過狗狗的話題哩。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 76 95 48 49]>いや～ まさか <Color=red><Ruby={2:4}いぬ>犬の<Ruby={2:6}はなし>話<Color=white>で
こんなに<Ruby={2:2}も>盛り<Ruby={2:2}あ>上がれるなんて
<Ruby={2:4}おも>思ってもみなかったさね

<Color=red>ウオトリー<Ruby={2:4}むら>村<Color=white>にいた<Ruby={2:4}ころ>頃は
<Ruby={2:4}いぬ>犬の<Ruby={2:6}はなし>話なんて したことなかったわいさ
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 76 95 48 49]>Who knew I'd get so excited <Color=red>talking
about dogs<Color=white>.

No one ever seemed to talk about dogs
at all when I lived in <Color=red>Lurelin Village<Color=white>.
